debug_info.goal:
lhs rhs : Aeneas.Std.Array U64 5#usize
hlhs : ∀ i < 5, ↑lhs[i]! < 2 ^ 54
hrhs : ∀ i < 5, ↑rhs[i]! < 2 ^ 54
⊢ ∃ r,
    mul lhs rhs = ok r ∧ Field51_as_Nat r ≡ Field51_as_Nat lhs * Field51_as_Nat rhs [MOD p] ∧ ∀ i < 5, ↑r[i]! < 2 ^ 52
